unique_key.description: Unique identifier of the complaint/service request

created_date.description: Timestamp when the complaint was created (ISO 8601)

closed_date.description: Timestamp when the complaint was closed (ISO 8601, null if open)

agency.description: Acronym of the agency handled the complaint (e.g., NYPD, DOT)

complaint_type.description: Category of the complaint (e.g., Noise - Residential)

descriptor.description: Detailed description of the complaint (e.g., Loud Music/Party)

status.description: Current status of the complaint (e.g., Open, Closed, Assigned)

incident_zip.description: Zip code of the incident location

city.description: City name of the incident, standardized in UPPERCASE

open_data_channel_type.description: Channel through which the complaint was reported (e.g., ONLINE, PHONE)
